scripts.start: docker rm -f screenshot-test || true && docker run -d -p 9000:8080 --name screenshot-test -v $HOME/.aws-lambda-rie:/rie -v $(pwd)/test-results:/var/task/test-results -e IS_LOCAL=true --entrypoint /rie/aws-lambda-rie screenshot-lambda /usr/bin/node /var/task/node_modules/.bin/aws-lambda-ric src/index.handler && sleep 5
scripts.test: yarn build && yarn start && yarn test:trigger
